content: We can reframe the core comparison between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and specialized curious agents as a test of whether intrinsic motivation is better implemented as a modular add-on to a general agent or a tightly integrated core capability of an agent specialized for exploratory learning. This reveals an underexplored design axis for 2024–2025 state-of-the-art memory-enabled active learning agents that no existing work systematically tests.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
